name: @xevion/tempo
description: Consolidated developer scripts with composable primitives and config-driven runners
author: Xevion

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/proc.ts src/fmt.ts src/preflight.ts src/targets.ts src/watch.ts src/octocov.ts --outdir dist --root src --target node --format esm --packages external --splitting --entry-naming '[dir]/[name].mjs' --chunk-naming '[name]-[hash].mjs' && bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.mjs --target node --format esm --packages external --banner '#!/usr/bin/env node'
scripts.test:install: bun run build && TARBALL=$(npm pack --pack-destination /tmp) && npm install -g "/tmp/$TARBALL"
